name: pcs-promo-parser
description: Parse vendor promo decks (Milwaukee, DeWalt, Makita, Bosch, EGO, Flex, GearWrench, Crescent) into PCS Kit Builder Stage 1 CSVs. Handles kit promos, NLP price drops, and exclusions including RSA, POS Redemption, and ARP. Outputs brand-quarter-year prefixed files ready for Stage 2/3/4.
